metadata.name: Pir ETB Partner With trigger — Toothy found in library
metadata.description: p1 casts Pir, Imaginative Rascal ({2}{G}). When Pir enters the battlefield, its 'Partner with Toothy, Imaginary Friend' ETB trigger fires (CR 702.124j): target player may search their library for a card named Toothy, Imaginary Friend, reveal it, put it into their hand, then shuffle. p1 chooses to search and finds Toothy. After the trigger resolves: Pir is on the battlefield under p1's control, Toothy is in p1's hand, and p1's library has been shuffled (is empty — Toothy was the only card).
metadata.generation_notes: Pir, Imaginative Rascal oracle text: 'Partner with Toothy, Imaginary Friend (When this creature enters, target player may put Toothy into their hand from their library, then shuffle.)'. CR 702.124j defines the Partner With ETB trigger: 'When this permanent enters, target player may search their library for a card named [name], reveal it, put it into their hand, then shuffle.' The trigger uses a StackObjectKind::PartnerWithTrigger. Resolution: p1 searches library for 'Toothy, Imaginary Friend', reveals it, puts it in hand, shuffles. Mana setup: p1 has {2}{G} to cast Pir ({2}{G}). Library contains exactly one card (Toothy). After trigger resolves: Pir on battlefield, Toothy in p1 hand, library empty (shuffled after removing Toothy). Note: the caller-provided CR refs for search (701.19) appear to reference Regenerate in current rules; the correct governing rule is 702.124j which encodes both the trigger and search-reveal-put-into-hand-shuffle instruction. Pir and Toothy are not in the engine's Available Cards list — card_ids are provided by caller: 'pir-imaginative-rascal' and 'toothy-imaginary-friend'.

script.step_note: p1 casts Pir, Imaginative Rascal from hand, paying {2}{G}.

actions.description: Initial: Pir in p1 hand, Toothy in p1 library, stack empty

actions.note: CR 601.2: p1 casts Pir, Imaginative Rascal; pays {2}{G} from pool.

actions.description: After casting: Pir on stack, p1 hand empty
actions.note: Pir moved from hand to stack.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — Pir resolves.

resolution.note: Pir, Imaginative Rascal enters the battlefield under p1's control.
CR 603.2: 'Partner with Toothy' ETB trigger fires; goes on stack targeting p1 (CR 702.124j).

actions.note: Pir enters battlefield; Partner With ETB trigger placed on stack.

actions.description: After Pir enters: Pir on battlefield, Partner With trigger on stack
actions.note: Pir on battlefield; Partner With trigger awaiting resolution.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — Partner With trigger resolves.

actions.object: Pir, Imaginative Rascal Partner With trigger

resolution.note: CR 702.124j: target player (p1) searches library for 'Toothy, Imaginary Friend', finds it.
CR 702.124j: Toothy, Imaginary Friend is revealed to all players.
CR 702.124j: Toothy, Imaginary Friend moves from library to p1's hand.
CR 702.124j: p1 shuffles their library after the search.

actions.note: Partner With trigger resolves: p1 searches, reveals, puts Toothy into hand, shuffles.

actions.description: Final: Pir on battlefield, Toothy in p1 hand, stack empty
actions.note: Pir on battlefield, Toothy successfully retrieved into p1's hand, stack empty.
